mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_file_storage ( business_type, business_id, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_name, original_file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, etag, upload_status, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, completed_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{storageProvider}, #{bucketName}, #{objectName}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileExt}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{etag}, #{uploadStatus}, #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, #{completedTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_file_storage SET business_type = #{businessType}, business_id = #{businessId}, storage_provider = #{storageProvider}, original_file_name = #{originalFileName}, file_ext = #{fileExt}, content_type = #{contentType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, etag = #{etag}, upload_status = #{uploadStatus}, upload_user_id = #{uploadUserId}, upload_user_name = #{uploadUserName}, completed_time = #{completedTime}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, business_type, business_id, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_name, original_file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, etag, upload_status, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, completed_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_file_storage WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, business_type, business_id, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_name, original_file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, etag, upload_status, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, completed_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_file_storage WHERE business_id = #{dataInfoId}

SELECT id, business_type, business_id, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_name, original_file_name, file_ext, content_type, file_size, etag, upload_status, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, completed_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.md_file_storage WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} AND object_name = #{objectName}
